1749330.name: Provenance: Room 226
1749330.description:
Provenance: Room 226 is a first person adventure game.

It tells the story of Vincent Spade, a young scientist working for the Stadler Corporation, who uncovers a dark secret and travels to a strange new world.

Challenge your mind as you attempt to make your way back home. Solve mysteries, unlock secrets, and complete challenging puzzles.

Key Features:
AAA Graphics
Many puzzles will impede your progress through Room226.
Immersive and engaging story that will leave you wanting more.
1749330.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
